subject: Your CLAUDE.md Optimizer license is ready
text:
Hi there,

Thanks for buying CLAUDE.md Optimizer. Your lifetime license is ready.

License key: {{licenseKey}}
Order reference: {{orderId}}
Amount paid: {{amountEur}} EUR

Download your bundle here:
{{downloadUrl}}

The download contains:
  optimizer.html (standalone web app, works offline)
  CLAUDE.md Optimizer.app (macOS launcher)
  CLAUDE.md Optimizer.exe (Windows launcher)
  README.md
  LICENSE_KEY.txt (your key for safekeeping)

The link works for 30 days from this email. Save the ZIP and your license key locally. If you lose the link, reply to this email with your order reference and we will send a fresh link.

Quick start:
  1. Unzip the bundle.
  2. Double click the .app or .exe (or open optimizer.html in your browser).
  3. Drop your CLAUDE.md onto the loader.
  4. Review duplicates and conflicts, then click Generate.
  5. Replace your old CLAUDE.md with CLAUDE_NEW.md from the output ZIP.

All parsing happens in your browser. Nothing leaves your machine.

If you hit any issue, just reply to this email.

Thanks,
Pinky Creative Studio
{{supportEmail}}
{{websiteUrl}}

Copyright {{year}} Pinky Creative Studio. Den Bosch, Netherlands.

Quick start
